subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones of the All-Merciful and His chosen ones! The lights of divine confirmation have shone forth from the Abhá Kingdom, and the oceans [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الرحمن و اصفیائه قد تلئلا انوار التایید من ملکوت الابهی و تموج بحور
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @call to action
